# subscribers()

**Type Method**

Returns the cellular network subscribers.

## Declaration

```swift
class func subscribers() -> [CTSubscriber]
```

## Return Value

An array of [doc://com.apple.coretelephony/documentation/CoreTelephony/CTSubscriber] instances.

## Getting Subscriber Information

- **subscriber()**: Returns the cellular network subscribers.
